introSection: Snoopy's Tenderpaw Twister Coaster is a steel launched kiddie roller coaster currently located at Knott's Berry Farm in Buena Park, California, USA. The ride was manufactured by the Italian company Zamperla. It opened on 27 June 2024.

sections.title: Color scheme
sections.content: Green track and dark grey supports.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: The train is designed to resemble a Jeep, with a figure of Snoopy taking up the entire first car.

sections.title: External links
sections.content: * Ride page on the park's website

fullText:
Snoopy's Tenderpaw Twister Coaster is a steel launched kiddie roller coaster currently located at Knott's Berry Farm in Buena Park, California, USA. The ride was manufactured by the Italian company Zamperla. It opened on 27 June 2024.



Green track and dark grey supports.

The train is designed to resemble a Jeep, with a figure of Snoopy taking up the entire first car.


 * Ride page on the park's website
